pi_items.source: Derived mathematically from setup_task.sh ffmpeg generation (60 sec at 24 fps = 1440 frames) retimed to 18 fps (1440/18 = 80.0).
Explicitly defined and used as absolute tolerance logic in verifier.py.
Task instructions and verifier.py explicit requirement for framerate constraint.
Explicitly defined and created in setup_task.sh.
Explicitly defined and created in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated video and audio files created via ffmpeg lavfi (testsrc2 and sine). The expected 80.0 second output duration is mathematically derived by taking the 60-second, 24 fps source video (1440 frames) and retiming it to the required 18 fps. Output directory and framerate constraints directly align with explicitly verified verifier logic and setup scripts.
